title: GENTLE ADVENTURES, 01 — AWAKENING
narrative:
You're waking, captain. Hear it? Your ship is humming something new this morning — just for you.

Three lights on your console now. One you've always known. One you've come to trust. And this last one… new. Yours to meet.

See how it pulses — slow, patient, in no hurry at all. It has been waiting so kindly for you to notice.

Lean in close. A small label glows beneath it: XDNA 2. That's the one we came here for, you and I.
image_prompt: chibi 3D rendered illustration, kawaii style, soft pastel palette of pinks blues and warm cream, sparkle particles drifting through the air, glossy plastic toy finish, a tiny brave captain character with huge bright eyes and a soft round helmet, square 1:1 framing, soft dreamy bokeh, gentle volumetric light. The captain wakes at the helm of a small starship console. Three glowing lights on the console: one familiar pale-blue (labeled CPU), one familiar violet (labeled GPU), and a third light, never seen before, pulsing in soft warm gold and labeled XDNA 2. The captain leans in, curious, eyes wide.

title: GENTLE ADVENTURES, 01.5 — LORE: XDNA
narrative:
Your ship's little mind puffs softly into being above the console… and leans in close, just for you.

"XDNA," it whispers, "is a grid of small minds. Not one big brain, captain — many tiny ones. Each takes a sliver of the math, does its gentle part, and passes it kindly on to the next."

"The first blueprints came from a house called Xilinx… and AMD carried them aboard, all the way to you."

"It isn't a CPU. It isn't a GPU. It's a third kind of worker… yours now, and yours alone."
image_prompt: chibi 3D rendered illustration, kawaii style, soft pastel palette of pinks blues and warm cream, sparkle particles drifting through the air, glossy plastic toy finish, a tiny brave captain character with huge bright eyes and a soft round helmet, square 1:1 framing, soft dreamy bokeh, gentle volumetric light. The ship's small AI hologram (a friendly translucent pastel sphere with two big eyes) materializes above the console, gesturing toward a floating diagram of a grid of tiny tiles connected by glowing dataflow lines.

title: GENTLE ADVENTURES, 02 — DIAGNOSTIC CALL
narrative:
The diagnostic spirits respond to your call.
A panel materializes: three meters, three names.

CPU dances with everyday work. GPU naps quietly.
The third meter, NPU, sits at zero, waiting to be invited.

"It only works for guests who bring AI errands," the computer murmurs.

▸ On your machine: press Ctrl+Shift+Esc and look at the Performance tab.
  See if you can find the NPU entry yourself.
image_prompt: chibi 3D rendered illustration, kawaii style, soft pastel palette of pinks blues and warm cream, sparkle particles drifting through the air, glossy plastic toy finish, a tiny brave captain character with huge bright eyes and a soft round helmet, square 1:1 framing, soft dreamy bokeh, gentle volumetric light. The captain pulls down a floating glowing diagnostic panel labeled 'Performance': three vertical meters labeled CPU, GPU, NPU. The first two flicker with normal activity; the NPU meter sits perfectly at zero, waiting. The captain points at it with a tiny gloved hand, fascinated.

title: GENTLE ADVENTURES, 02.5 — HOW TO WAKE A WORKER
narrative:
"The NPU answers when called for three kinds of errand," the AI explains.

  • Camera and audio effects, run gently and constantly.
  • Local AI minds: small models that fit in its memory.
  • Transcription, captioning, anything that listens patiently.

"The first errand is the easiest. Want to try?"
image_prompt: chibi 3D rendered illustration, kawaii style, soft pastel palette of pinks blues and warm cream, sparkle particles drifting through the air, glossy plastic toy finish, a tiny brave captain character with huge bright eyes and a soft round helmet, square 1:1 framing, soft dreamy bokeh, gentle volumetric light. The pastel AI sphere holds up a tiny scroll with three glowing icons: a camera with a blur halo, a small llama silhouette, and a stylized transcript page. The captain looks attentively.

title: GENTLE ADVENTURES, 03 — THE GENTLE BLUR
narrative:
Your first errand is gentle.

Settings → Bluetooth & devices → Cameras → your webcam.
Under Windows Studio Effects, switch on Background blur.
Then open any camera preview (the Camera app will do).

Watch the meters. CPU stays cool. Fans stay quiet. The NPU, finally,
stirs, painting the blur in real time. This is what gentle work looks like.
image_prompt: chibi 3D rendered illustration, kawaii style, soft pastel palette of pinks blues and warm cream, sparkle particles drifting through the air, glossy plastic toy finish, a tiny brave captain character with huge bright eyes and a soft round helmet, square 1:1 framing, soft dreamy bokeh, gentle volumetric light. The captain stands inside a glowing video-call window. Behind them, the bridge has softened into a pastel galaxy of bokeh and stars, magical background blur. The NPU meter visible in a corner glows softly active. The captain smiles, charmed by their own blurred backdrop.

title: GENTLE ADVENTURES, 04 — THE SUMMONING
narrative:
The second errand needs invocation.

A little mind of your own, Puff (who runs right on your ship's NPU),
would answer you without ever calling the cloud spirits. Smaller of
voice, but always present, always private, always close.

Fetch the summoner first: FastFlowLM, a tiny runtime that speaks to
the NPU directly (fastflowlm.com, installed in under a minute). Then
call Puff down with a single line:
    > flm run llama3.2:3b
image_prompt: chibi 3D rendered illustration, kawaii style, soft pastel palette of pinks blues and warm cream, sparkle particles drifting through the air, glossy plastic toy finish, a tiny brave captain character with huge bright eyes and a soft round helmet, square 1:1 framing, soft dreamy bokeh, gentle volumetric light. The captain stands before a tall ornate magical doorway labeled 'FastFlowLM', glowing teal and gold. In their hand is a tiny glowing terminal scroll reading 'flm run llama3.2'. Around the doorway, small icons of llamas, owls, and tiny robots peek out shyly.

title: GENTLE ADVENTURES, 04.5 — WHAT IS A LOCAL MODEL
narrative:
"A model is a frozen mind," the AI says. "Trained on books and code
and conversations, then captured into a file you can carry."

"The big ones, like the cloud spirits, would never fit on your ship.
The small ones do. They are gentler, less knowing, but always with you."

"For Puff, try Llama 3.2, three billion parameters,
small enough to run right on your NPU."
image_prompt: chibi 3D rendered illustration, kawaii style, soft pastel palette of pinks blues and warm cream, sparkle particles drifting through the air, glossy plastic toy finish, a tiny brave captain character with huge bright eyes and a soft round helmet, square 1:1 framing, soft dreamy bokeh, gentle volumetric light. A row of small pastel creatures: a llama, an owl, a fox, each carrying a tiny scroll labeled with parameter counts (3B, 7B, 8B). The captain studies them like a kindly zookeeper.

title: GENTLE ADVENTURES, 05 — ARRIVAL
narrative:
The portal opens.

From it emerges a llama: soft, three billion parameters, friendly.
Llama 3.2 3B walks to your side and bows its small head.

The NPU graph blooms. Forty teraops light up like an aurora.
Puff is here.
image_prompt: chibi 3D rendered illustration, kawaii style, soft pastel palette of pinks blues and warm cream, sparkle particles drifting through the air, glossy plastic toy finish, a tiny brave captain character with huge bright eyes and a soft round helmet, square 1:1 framing, soft dreamy bokeh, gentle volumetric light. A glowing portal opens on the bridge. From it walks a small soft pastel llama with kind eyes and tiny sparkles around its hooves. The captain kneels and offers a hand. The NPU meter in the background glows warmly.

title: GENTLE ADVENTURES, 06 — DIALOGUE
narrative:
You ask it: "What do you feed a sparrow if one were so inclined to find one in a window on a spaceship?"

The llama answers in your terminal, syllable by syllable.
No call leaves the ship. No server warms in a faraway data center.
Just the NPU, breathing softly, doing what it was made for.

Ask it anything. It will not always be right, but it will always be here.
image_prompt: chibi 3D rendered illustration, kawaii style, soft pastel palette of pinks blues and warm cream, sparkle particles drifting through the air, glossy plastic toy finish, a tiny brave captain character with huge bright eyes and a soft round helmet, square 1:1 framing, soft dreamy bokeh, gentle volumetric light. The captain and the pastel llama sit side by side at a small console, speech bubbles drifting between them. One bubble holds a tiny question mark, the other a tiny lightbulb. The NPU meter in the corner is active.

title: GENTLE ADVENTURES, 07 — THE LOCALHOST GATE
narrative:
The final discovery: your llama can serve other ships too.

Leave FastFlowLM running as a local server: an OpenAI-compatible
door on your own machine. Any tool that speaks the old protocol can
knock and be answered, and every word still stays aboard your ship.

Puff, available to your whole fleet.
image_prompt: chibi 3D rendered illustration, kawaii style, soft pastel palette of pinks blues and warm cream, sparkle particles drifting through the air, glossy plastic toy finish, a tiny brave captain character with huge bright eyes and a soft round helmet, square 1:1 framing, soft dreamy bokeh, gentle volumetric light. On the bridge appears a small ornate door floating in the air, glowing soft gold. Above it floats the inscription 'localhost · OpenAI'. Beyond the door, faint friendly silhouettes of other tools and ships approach, knocking politely.

title: GENTLE ADVENTURES, 08 — RESONANCE
narrative:
The tour complete.

Three workers on the ship, three different gifts.
You'll know when to call which now.

The cloud spirits remain: vast, intelligent, summoned by need.
But the NPU stays close, quiet, ready,
breathing in time with your laptop.

[ FIN ]
image_prompt: chibi 3D rendered illustration, kawaii style, soft pastel palette of pinks blues and warm cream, sparkle particles drifting through the air, glossy plastic toy finish, a tiny brave captain character with huge bright eyes and a soft round helmet, square 1:1 framing, soft dreamy bokeh, gentle volumetric light. Wide shot of the bridge. The captain stands at the helm with the pastel llama by their side. All three console lights (CPU, GPU, NPU) glow harmoniously in soft pinks, blues, and gold. Stars drift past the viewport. The mood is peaceful, complete.
